subject: Message Router Helm Chart Standardization
commit_message:
Message Router Helm Chart Standardization

Issue-ID: OOM-731

Change-Id: I2137b9dbe7c7a320094c13779e8e43dadef964c7
Signed-off-by: pramod <pramod.kumarsharma@amdocs.com>
Signed-off-by: Mike Elliott <mike.elliott@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 3:

(3 comments)

Need to add license to all committed files. If other companies contributed you can add them to the list at the top of the license.

Failed to pull image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/kafka:latest": rpc error: code = 2 desc = Error: image kafka:latest not found

To enable the installation of this via:  helm install local/onap -n dev --namespace onap
You will need to update onap/requirements.yaml to bump message-router version to ~2.0.0.

Patch Set 3:

There is no harm in keeping those files. They are required for AAF integration, which we are planning to complete by RCO

Patch Set 4:

> There is no harm in keeping those files. They are required for AAF
 > integration, which we are planning to complete by RCO

Hi Sunil, Mike, Mahendra

The suggested changes are incorporated into the new patch.

 > There is no harm in keeping those files. They are required for AAF
 > integration, which we are planning to complete by RCO

Hi Sunil, Mike, Mahendra 

The suggested changed are incorporated into the new patch, Please review the patch

Patch Set 6:

> (8 comments)

Hi Borislav,

Suggested changes are accommodated into the patch. Please review.

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1 Verified-1

(2 comments)

There are errors when running "helm install local/onap --name prod3 --namespace onap":

onap          prod3-dmaap-1718385533-jf0f6                                          0/1       Init:0/1           0          1m
onap          prod3-global-kafka-1413861536-hnn21                                   0/1       ImagePullBackOff   0          1m
onap          prod3-zookeeper-1431480974-tndm4                                      1/1       Running            0          1m

  1m            1m              1       kubelet, kubernetes-node3-borislavto-12968-03-28-18     spec.initContainers{global-kafka-readiness}     Normal          Created                 Created container
  1m            1m              1       kubelet, kubernetes-node3-borislavto-12968-03-28-18     spec.initContainers{global-kafka-readiness}     Normal          Started                 Started container
  43s           43s             1       kubelet, kubernetes-node3-borislavto-12968-03-28-18     spec.containers{global-kafka}                   Warning         Failed                  Failed to pull image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/kafka:latest": rpc error: code = 2 desc = Error: image kafka:latest not found
